recommendations.title: Rabbit Seasoning
recommendations.overview: Elmer Fudd is hunting both Daffy Duck and Bugs Bunny again.

recommendations.title: Hair-Raising Hare
recommendations.overview: A sneaker-wearing, hairy monster chases Bugs through a castle belonging to an evil scientist.

recommendations.title: Feed the Kitty
recommendations.overview: A bulldog adopts an adorable kitten, but he can't let his owner know.

recommendations.title: What's Opera, Doc?
recommendations.overview: Elmer Fudd is again hunting rabbits - only this time it's an opera. Wagner's Siegfried with Elmer as the titular hero and Bugs as Brunnhilde. They sing, they dance, they eat the scenery.

recommendations.title: Rabbit of Seville
recommendations.overview: Behind the Hollywood Bowl stage which is playing the opera The Barber of Seville, Bugs Bunny flees into the backstage area with Elmer Fudd in close pursuit. Seeing his opportunity to fight on his terms, Bugs raises the curtain on Elmer, trapping him

recommendations.title: Robin Hood Daffy
recommendations.overview: Daffy attempts to convince Porky, as Friar Tuck, that he really is Robin Hood.

recommendations.title: Duck Dodgers in the 24½th Century
recommendations.overview: Space hero Daffy battles Marvin the Martian for control of Planet X.

recommendations.title: Duck! Rabbit, Duck!
recommendations.overview: The final installment of the "Hunting Trilogy" once again has Elmer out hunting, while Bugs and Daffy try to con him into shooting the other.

recommendations.title: Duck Amuck
recommendations.overview: The short-tempered Daffy Duck must improvise madly as the backgrounds, his costumes, the soundtrack, even his physical form, shifts and changes at the whim of the animator.

recommendations.title: Rabbit Fire
recommendations.overview: Daffy Duck and Bugs argue back and forth whether it is duck season or rabbit season. The object of their arguments is hunter Elmer Fudd.
